ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "playerid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birthdate of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Player's height */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Player's weight */,
  "position" TEXT /* Player's primary position */,
  "dominant_hand" TEXT /* Dominant hand (e.g., right, left) */,
  "education" TEXT /* Educational background */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_team" TEXT /* Team that drafted the player */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Draft pick number */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's image */,
  "social_media_handle" TEXT /* Player's social media handle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playerid")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "teamid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was established */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Stadium capacity */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* Team's Twitter handle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teamid")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_stats" (
  "playerid" TEXT /* Player ID referencing the player */,
  "teamid" TEXT /* Team ID referencing the team */,
  "yearid" INTEGER /* Year of performance data */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of games played or performance metrics */,
  "stint" INTEGER /* Stint refers to the part of the season */,
  "games_started" INTEGER /* Number of games started */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points scored */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Total steals */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Total blocks */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Total turnovers */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Total field goals made */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Total field goals attempted */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Total free throws made */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Total free throws attempted */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Total three-pointers made */,
  "three_pointers_attempted" INTEGER /* Total three-pointers attempted */,
  "performance_rating" REAL /* Overall performance rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playerid", "teamid", "yearid", "stint")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coachid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the coach */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the coach */,
  "teamid" TEXT /* ID of the team the coach is associated with */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date when the coach was hired */,
  "position" TEXT /* Coach's position (e.g., head coach, assistant coach) */,
  "previous_teams" TEXT /* Previous teams coached */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the coach's image */,
  "social_media_handle" TEXT /* Coach's social media handle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coachid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_teamid FOREIGN KEY ("teamid") REFERENCES teams ("teamid")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "seasonid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the season */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "playoff_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the playoffs */,
  "playoff_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the playoffs */,
  "champion_teamid" TEXT /* Team ID of the champion */,
  "mvp_playerid" TEXT /* Player ID of the MVP */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seasonid")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging into the platform */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for account recovery */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for contact */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity performed by the user */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_roster" (
  "teamid" TEXT /* ID of the team the player is associated with */,
  "playerid" TEXT /* ID of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player in the team */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the player (e.g., active, injured) */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the player's contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the player's contract */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Player's salary */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Player's jersey number */,
  "injured_reason" TEXT /* Reason for injury (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teamid", "playerid")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "playerid" TEXT /* ID of the player being reviewed */,
  "yearid" INTEGER /* Year of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was conducted */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments/feedback about the player's performance */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person who conducted the review */,
  "performance_score" INTEGER /* Numerical score for performance */,
  "improvement_areas" TEXT /* Areas for improvement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_yearid FOREIGN KEY ("yearid") REFERENCES seasons ("seasonid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_playerid FOREIGN KEY ("playerid") REFERENCES players ("playerid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)
